prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `984d8a3e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `984d8a3e` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: preserve each row’s three color counts, keep the right block fixed, and shift the middle band left so its right boundary is the minimum achievable across rows; the displaced left-color cells reappear immediately to the right of the middle band.

I used the Opus hint as a starting point and discarded the Sonnet hint because it incorrectly described a diagonal reflection. That correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_984d8a3e/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed.
